narrative:
North Olmsted-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,168 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.6 percentage points.
